tool_args.label: Woodhaven Boulevard, Capital Projects - Queens Boulevard to 107 Avenue

payload.title: Woodhaven Boulevard, Capital Projects
payload.publisher: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)
payload.description: Presented to Queens Community Board 9 Transportation, Public Transit, Street Safety Committee on December 19, 2024. Covers background on 2017 Street Improvement Project, performance metrics, upcoming capital projects (Phase B, Metropolitan Av, Phase C), and next steps.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Boulevard, Queens Boulevard to 107th Avenue

payload.description: Major bus corridor hosting the Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service, with 30,000+ daily riders, connections to Queens Boulevard, the Rockaways, 8 subway lines, 20 Local and Express bus routes. Vision Zero Priority Corridor since 2019.
Operates on Woodhaven Blvd as Select Bus Service, serving same stops as Q53 SBS between Broad Channel and Rego Park
Operates on Woodhaven Blvd as Select Bus Service, serving same stops as Q52 SBS between Broad Channel and Rego Park

6.85 miles of bus lanes installed on Woodhaven Blvd as part of Q52/Q53 SBS launch in 2017. Included offset, median, and curbside alignment bus lanes, bus boarding islands at 12 bus stops, bus stop amenities, pedestrian safety measures at 14 intersections, ADA compliant pedestrian refuges at 11 intersections.

Upcoming capital project: Union Turnpike to 107 Av. Upgrade 16 bus stops, 17 sidewalk extensions, 12 shortened crossings, 38 medians/median tips. Add 7 additional crossings, 3 raised crosswalks, 75+ street trees, 10,000+ sq ft landscaped area. Involves CB5, CB6, CB9, CB10.
Upcoming capital project on Woodhaven Blvd from Yellowstone Blvd to 77 Av. Involves CB5 and CB6. Est. Construction: 2028.

extra_fields.limits: Woodhaven Blvd from Yellowstone Blvd to 77 Av

payload.description: Upcoming capital project on Woodhaven Blvd from Queens Blvd to 66 Av. Involves CB5 and CB6. Est. Construction: TBD.

tool_args.label: 56 people killed or severely injured on Woodhaven Blvd (2019-2023)

payload.raw_value_text: 56 people have been killed or severely injured on Woodhaven Boulevard in the past 5 years (2019 - 2023) Compared to 69 over the 5 years prior (2014 - 2018). 19% decrease.

payload.claim_text: Pedestrian safety measures don't have full impact until solidified with permanent materials. Crowding and lack of amenities at bus stops. Large sections of the roadway and many of the medians remain in poor condition. Some bus operations issues remain.
payload.description: Remaining challenges on Woodhaven Blvd corridor identified in the presentation

payload.claim_text: Build out temporary pedestrian safety measures to solidify them with permanent materials. Install additional pedestrian safety measures that couldn't be implemented as part of the in-house 2017 street improvement project. Create more pedestrian circulation space and add amenities at bus stops. Add trees and other landscape elements throughout corridor.
payload.description: Capital goals / toolkit for Woodhaven Blvd improvements
